questions.question: How does the barcode scanning work?
questions.answer: Our system supports multiple barcode formats and can be used with your existing product barcodes. Staff can scan items using a dedicated scanner or our mobile app on any smartphone. Scanning updates inventory counts in real-time and can be used for both receiving and dispensing items.

questions.question: Can we track sterilization of instruments?
questions.answer: Yes, our system includes specialized features for tracking sterilization cycles. You can create instrument packages, assign unique IDs, and track their sterilization history, ensuring proper infection control and regulatory compliance.

questions.question: How does automatic reordering work?
questions.answer: You set minimum threshold levels for each product. When inventory falls below that level, the system automatically generates a purchase order that can be reviewed before sending. Orders can be automatically sent to vendors via email, EDI, or their online ordering portal.

questions.question: Can we track usage by procedure?
questions.answer: Yes, our system allows you to create procedure templates that list all required items. When procedures are performed, inventory is automatically deducted, giving you precise usage data and cost analysis by procedure type.

questions.question: Is there a limit to how many items we can track?
questions.answer: Our Essentials plan supports up to 500 items, Professional up to 2,000, and Enterprise has unlimited items. Most dental practices have between 300-1,500 inventory items depending on specialties and services offered.

reviews.name: Dr. Richard Miller
reviews.comment: Since implementing this inventory system, we've reduced our monthly supply costs by 22%. The automatic reordering alone has saved us countless hours of staff time and prevented those panic moments when we discover we're out of something essential.

reviews.name: Jessica Torres
reviews.comment: Managing supplies for our multi-location practice used to be a nightmare. Now we have complete visibility across all locations and can even transfer items between offices when needed. The time savings has been remarkable.

reviews.name: Dr. Emily Chang
reviews.comment: The cost analytics feature helped us identify several areas where we were overspending. We've optimized our ordering and negotiated better rates with vendors based on the data. The system paid for itself within the first three months.

cta.title: Ready to Optimize Your Dental Inventory?
